article.body_preview:
DHAKA, June 7, 2023 (BSS) - Federation of Bangladesh Chambers of Commerce and Industry (FBCCI) President Md Jashim Uddin today urged the government to extend policy support towards import-substitute industries in the country to lessen import pressure on foreign exchange.

The FBCCI president made the call while addressing a post-budget discussion as a special guest organized by the Economic Reporters' Forum (ERF) jointly with RAPID and Asia Foundation held at the ERF auditorium at Paltan in the

llm_connections.evidence_quote: extend policy support towards import-substitute industries in the country to lessen import pressure on foreign exchange.
llm_connections.scope_justification: The quote explicitly describes a national policy action intended to lessen 'import pressure on foreign exchange', which refers to country-level imports and thus matches the imports feature scope.

verification.quote_best_match: extend policy support towards import-substitute industries in the country to lessen import pressure on foreign exchange.
verification.judge_reasoning: The article explicitly states that extending policy support to import-substitute industries is intended 'to lessen import pressure on foreign exchange,' and this is discussed at the national level for Bangladesh.
